chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 307 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.03.2026 For orders on MA 2328/26 For orders on MA 2329/26 Mr. Ali Anwar Saahar, Advocate for applicants 1. Urgency granted. 2. The applicants were granted protective bail for ten days for surrendering before the trial court but they failed and through listed application, they seek extention of time for surrendering before the trial court as according to them they could not surrender before the trial court due to enmity with the complainant party and further due to holidays they will not be able to arrange the surety for the trial court. Accordingly the listed application (MA No. 2329 of 2026) is allowed. The period of protection is extended for further ten days i.e. up to 27.3.2026. The listed application stands disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
